name: 17q21_32_LRRC37_SD
description: 17q21.31-q21.32 LRRC37 SD family — multi-copy LRRC37 paralogs (LRRC37A, A2, A3, B, B2) distributed within and flanking the 17q21.31 inversion polymorphism. Acts as the LCR substrate for the recurrent Koolen-de Vries microdeletion and the H1/H2 inversion.

architecture.internal_structure: LRRC37 SD copies of ~50-100 kb at >98% identity in direct orientation on the H1 background, partially inverted on H2; LRRC37A2 is on the inverted segment. NPEPPS, ARL17A/B, and MAPT pseudogenes are part of the duplicon.
